title: Adiyae Azhagae Lyrics Oru Naal Koothu Song Lyrics
stanzas: Oru Naal Koothu Adiyae Azhagae Song Lyrics

Adiyae Azhagae
yen azhagae adiyae
pesaama
nooru nooraa
kooru podaadha

vazhiyae vazhiyae
yen oliyae oliyae
naan onnum boodhamilla
dhooram odaadha

kaadhoda nee ericha
vaartha vandhu keerudhe.
aanaalum nee thelicha
kadhal ulla oorudhe.

vaayaadi peyaa en
thookka thookki pora.

theethoovi

aanaa kitta

kobam

marachi nee
paarthum velukkuthu
saayam

hey naeththe  naan
thoaththaen ada
idhuthaana un vegam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for Adiyae Azhagae?

The music was composed by the talented Justin Prabhakaran.

Which movie features the song Adiyae Azhagae?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Oru Naal Koothu.

Who are the singers of Adiyae Azhagae?

The song is sung by Padmalatha and Sean Roldan.

What is the theme of Adiyae Azhagae?

The song beautifully portrays themes of love and emotional connection.

When was the movie Oru Naal Koothu released?

The movie was released in the year 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adiyae Azhagae from the 2016 Tamil movie Oru Naal Koothu features Dinesh Ravi and Nivetha Pethuraj in lead roles. This romantic duet, composed by Justin Prabhakaran and sung by Padmalatha and Sean Roldan, is a soothing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. The lyrics by Vivek beautifully convey the emotions of the characters, making it a memorable addition to the film's narrative. The song's serene tune and heartfelt words resonate deeply with listeners, making it a favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adiyae Azhagae from the movie Oru Naal Koothu is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by Justin Prabhakaran, with heartfelt lyrics by Vivek, and soulfully rendered by Padmalatha and Sean Roldan, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Its soothing tune and romantic vibe make it a timeless favorite for all music enthusiasts.
